name: Odoo Purchase Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo 19 Purchase: RFQs, purchase orders, vendor management, supplier pricelists, procurement rules, dropshipping, landed costs, vendor bills, three-way matching, and purchase agreements.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and mail framework

capabilities.name: RFQ & Purchase Order Management
capabilities.description: Create and manage RFQs and POs, vendor communication, confirmation, amendments, and receipt/billing tracking.

capabilities.name: Vendor Management
capabilities.description: Configure vendors, supplier info, vendor evaluation, multiple addresses, and payment terms.

capabilities.name: Purchase Pricelists & Discounts
capabilities.description: Set up product.supplierinfo records, quantity breaks, min qty, multiple currencies, and discount fields.

capabilities.name: Procurement & Replenishment
capabilities.description: Use reordering rules, make-to-order, buy routes, and procurement groups to automate purchase proposals.

capabilities.name: Dropshipping
capabilities.description: Configure dropship route and rules so vendors ship directly to customers without stocking goods.

capabilities.name: Landed Costs
capabilities.description: Allocate freight, insurance, and duty costs to received stock using stock.landed.cost.

capabilities.name: Vendor Bills & Three-Way Matching
capabilities.description: Create vendor bills from PO/receipts, match quantities and prices, and handle price/quantity exceptions.

capabilities.name: Purchase Agreements & Blanket Orders
capabilities.description: Use purchase.requisition to create blanket orders, call for tenders, and compare vendor quotations.

capabilities.name: Purchase Approval Workflows
capabilities.description: Configure multi-level approvals, budget limits, and team-based approval rules.

limitations: Three-way matching requires purchase, stock, and accounting modules installed
Landed costs are applied on receipt validation and may require manual splits
Purchase blanket orders do not automatically release against incoming demand unless configured

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial Purchase skill based on Odoo 19 purchase modules
